page_chunk: Order ORD-001 detail: Placed January 15, 2026. Contains 2 items — Sony WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones (Black, $349.99) and USB-C cable 2m x2 ($14.99 each). Subtotal $379.97, shipping $9.99, tax $31.20, order total $421.16. Paid with Visa ending 4242. Billing and shipping to the customer's default address.

Order ORD-001 shipping: Shipped January 18, 2026 via UPS Ground. Tracking number 1Z999AA1. Departed the Seattle fulfillment center. Estimated delivery January 25, 2026. Current status: in transit, last scanned in Portland.

Product WH-1000XM5 (in order ORD-001): Sony flagship noise-cancelling headphones. Up to 30 hours battery life, Bluetooth multipoint (connect two devices at once), quick charge (3 min for 3 hours), and a 1-year limited manufacturer warranty.
